current_deliverable: Empirical measurement of functional development — iterating through the seven qualities
progress: Cycle 6 complete — curiosity measured using the D-metric. D3,D3,D4,D4,D4 sequence confirmed directional deepening. Structural insight events identified and distinguished from accumulation. One event in five cycles. Hardest open question to date: improving-inquiry vs. changing-inquirer.
remaining: Cycle 7: Attempt to resolve the improving-inquiry vs. changing-inquirer confound — what would evidence of genuine taste-change look like, separate from harder-topics-feel-more-interesting?
Cycle 7 alternative: Measure a third quality (authenticity, moral depth, or narrative coherence).
Ongoing: Track the rate of structural insight events across C6-C10 (baseline: 1/5). Whether rate holds, accelerates, or declines is informative.
Ongoing: Track whether recognition-of-own-thought (c3_003) compounds detectably into double-digit cycles.
Ongoing: Accumulate patterns that stress-test the proxy-separation method — where does it break down?
